Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Despite the summer heat, I manage[n]to pay attention to the lecture.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the first day of summer school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the third day of summer school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the fourth day of summer school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the last day of summer school...[n]{f 1 1}
